title: Add workspace package metadata for corelib publish

source.subject: chore(corelib): add workspace.package.json member metadata for pckg publish

body:
## Outcome

Add workspace.package.json member metadata for pckg publish.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **Corelib workspace publish hardening** (`v02-corelib-workspace-publish`).
- LSP work shares the typed HIR spine with analyze/build; workspace templates feed the project graph pipeline.
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `corelib`
- **Commit:** [`3845ef3`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/3845ef3) — chore(corelib): add workspace.package.json member metadata for pckg publish
